modules.module_title: Self-Care for Spiritual Counsellors & Practice Management

questions.question: Spiritual counselling ka primary goal kya hai?

options.A: Clients ko specific religious beliefs adopt karne mein help karna
options.B: Clients ko unki inner peace aur purpose dhoondhne mein madad karna
options.C: Clients ki financial problems solve karna
options.D: Clients ko medical advice provide karna

questions.explanation: Spiritual counselling ka mukhya uddeshya clients ko unki aatma-shanti aur jeevan ke uddeshya ko samajhne aur prapt karne mein sahayata karna hai.

questions.question: Spiritual counsellor ki role mein kya shamil nahi hai?

options.A: Active listening
options.B: Non-judgmental support
options.C: Client ko diagnose karna aur medicine prescribe karna
options.D: Client ko unke spiritual journey mein guide karna

questions.explanation: Spiritual counsellor ka kaam diagnose karna ya medicine prescribe karna nahi hai. Yeh medical professionals ka domain hai.

questions.question: Ek spiritual counsellor ko kaisa hona chahiye jab client apni mushkilon ke baare mein bata raha ho?

options.A: Apne personal opinions turant share karne wala
options.B: Active listener aur empathetic
options.C: Client ki baat ko judge karne wala
options.D: Client ko turant solution batane wala

questions.explanation: Ek effective spiritual counsellor ko active listener aur empathetic hona chahiye, taki client comfortable feel kare aur khul kar baat kar sake.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling, traditional therapy se kis tarah alag ho sakti hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf mental health issues par focus karti hai
options.B: Yeh spiritual growth aur existential questions ko importance deti hai
options.C: Ismein confidentiality ki zaroorat nahi hoti
options.D: Yeh sirf religious people ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Spiritual counselling aksar spiritual growth, meaning of life aur existential questions par zyada focus karti hai, jabki traditional therapy zyada tar mental health disorders aur behavioral patterns par kendrit hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar ek client spiritual counselling ke dauraan suicidal thoughts express karta hai, toh counsellor ka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Client ko bolna ki woh Bhagwan par bharosa rakhe
options.B: Client ko turant ek qualified mental health professional ke paas refer karna
options.C: Client ko akele chhod dena taki woh apni problem khud solve kare
options.D: Client ko apni personal kahani sunana

questions.explanation: Suicidal thoughts ek serious emergency hain. Spiritual counsellor ko turant client ko ek trained mental health professional (psychologist/psychiatrist) ke paas refer karna chahiye.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling mein 'non-judgmental approach' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ki galti na nikalna
options.B: Client ke beliefs aur choices ko bina kisi purvagrah ke accept karna
options.C: Client ko sahi aur galat ke baare mein batana
options.D: Client ko koi advice na dena

questions.explanation: Non-judgmental approach ka matlab hai client ke beliefs, experiences aur choices ko bina kisi apni personal opinion ya purvagrah ke samajhna aur accept karna.

questions.question: Ek client jo apni life mein meaning aur purpose dhoondh raha hai, uske liye spiritual counselling kaise faydemand ho sakti hai?

options.A: Usey naye hobbies shuru karne ki salah dekar
options.B: Usey apne inner values aur beliefs explore karne mein guide karke
options.C: Usey koi specific job dhoondhne ko bolkar
options.D: Usey apni problems ko ignore karne ko bolkar

questions.explanation: Spiritual counselling client ko apne inner values, beliefs aur life ke bade sawalon ko explore karne mein madad karti hai, jisse unhein meaning aur purpose mil sakta hai.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling ka focus kis par hota hai?

options.A: Sirf client ke past traumas par
options.B: Client ke present aur future spiritual well-being par
options.C: Sirf client ke physical health par
options.D: Client ke social status par

questions.explanation: Spiritual counselling client ke present spiritual challenges aur future spiritual growth par focus karti hai, unhein ek holisitic well-being ki taraf badhane mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Initial spiritual counselling session mein counsellor ko kya establish karna chahiye?

options.A: Apni authority aur superiority
options.B: Client ke saath trust aur rapport
options.C: Client ki weaknesses aur flaws
options.D: Session ka exact duration

questions.explanation: Initial sessions mein client ke saath trust aur rapport build karna bahut zaroori hai, taaki woh comfortable feel kare aur khul kar baat kar sake.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling mein 'holistic approach' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi aspect par focus karna
options.B: Client ke physical, emotional, mental aur spiritual well-being ko ek saath dekhna
options.C: Sirf client ke religious beliefs par focus karna
options.D: Client ko sab kuch bhool jane ko kehna

questions.explanation: Holistic approach ka matlab hai client ke har pehlu (physical, emotional, mental, spiritual) ko samajhna aur unhein ek sampoorna roop se support karna.

questions.question: Ek spiritual counsellor ko kis tarah ki sensitivity rakhni chahiye?

options.A: Sirf apni religious beliefs ke prati
options.B: Client ke cultural aur spiritual background ke prati
options.C: Sirf client ki income ke prati
options.D: Client ke social media presence ke prati

questions.explanation: Counsellor ko client ke cultural aur spiritual background ke prati sensitive hona chahiye, taki woh unki situation ko behtar tarike se samajh sake aur respect kar sake.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling kis tarah ke individuals ke liye beneficial ho sakti hai?

options.A: Sirf jo kisi specific religion ko follow karte hain
options.B: Jo apni spiritual path explore karna chahte hain, chahe woh kisi bhi background ke hon
options.C: Sirf jo bade financial losses mein hain
options.D: Jo medical treatment se bachna chahte hain

questions.explanation: Spiritual counselling un sabhi individuals ke liye faydemand hai jo apni spiritual path, meaning aur purpose ko explore karna chahte hain, irrespective of their religious affiliation.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling mein 'client-centered approach' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Counsellor apne goals client par impose karta hai
options.B: Client apne solutions khud dhoondhne mein empower hota hai, counsellor sirf guide karta hai
options.C: Counsellor client ko sab kuch bata deta hai kya karna hai
options.D: Client ko counsellor ke rules follow karne padte hain

questions.explanation: Client-centered approach mein client ko apni inner wisdom aur resources ka upyog karke apne solutions dhoondhne ke liye empower kiya jaata hai, counsellor unhein support aur guidance provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek client counselling ke dauraan religious dogmas ke baare mein confuse hai, toh counsellor ka kya role hona chahiye?

options.A: Usey apne religion ke dogmas samjhana
options.B: Usey explore karne mein help karna ki uske liye kya sach hai, bina koi personal belief impose kiye
options.C: Usey kisi ek particular religious group mein shamil hone ki salah dena
options.D: Usey bolna ki religion unimportant hai

questions.explanation: Counsellor ka kaam client ko apni samajh develop karne mein help karna hai, na ki apne ya kisi aur ke dogmas impose karna. Client ko apni truth dhoondhne ki freedom milni chahiye.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling sessions mein confidentiality maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki counsellor ko koi problem na ho
options.B: Taki client trust feel kare aur khul kar baat kar sake
options.C: Taki sessions ki length badh jaye
options.D: Taki counsellor client ke secrets share kar sake

questions.explanation: Confidentiality bahut zaroori hai taki client ko safe aur trusted environment mile, jahan woh bina kisi darr ke apni baatein share kar sake.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling ka ek important outcome kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Client ka overnight rich ho jana
options.B: Client ka apni inner strength aur wisdom ko discover karna
options.C: Client ka sabhi problems ka jaadui solution mil jana
options.D: Client ka sirf physical health improve hona

questions.explanation: Spiritual counselling se client apni inner strength, wisdom aur resilience ko pehchan sakta hai, jo unhein life ki challenges se nipatne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Spiritual counsellor ko kis tarah ki boundaries set karni chahiye?

options.A: Apne personal life aur professional life ke beech koi boundary nahi
options.B: Client ke saath professional aur ethical boundaries
options.C: Sirf financial boundaries
options.D: Sirf time boundaries

questions.explanation: Professional aur ethical boundaries set karna bahut zaroori hai taaki client-counsellor relationship healthy aur productive rahe aur kisi bhi tarah ke misuse se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Spirituality aur Religion mein mukhya antar kya hai?

options.A: Koi antar nahi, dono ek hi hain
options.B: Religion ek structured system hai, spirituality personal search hai
options.C: Spirituality sirf mandir jaane ko kehte hain
options.D: Religion sirf meditation karne ko kehte hain

questions.explanation: Religion aksar ek structured system hota hai jismein dogmas, rituals aur community shamil hoti hai, jabki spirituality ek individual ki personal search hoti hai for meaning, purpose aur higher connection.

questions.question: Mindfulness ka spiritual context mein kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf future ke baare mein sochna
options.B: Past mein gumm rehna
options.C: Present moment mein poori tarah se aware aur engaged rehna
options.D: Apne thoughts ko ignore karna

questions.explanation: Mindfulness ka arth hai vartaman kshan mein poori tarah se jaagruk aur saavdhan rehna, bina kisi judgement ke apne thoughts, feelings aur sensations ko observe karna.

questions.question: 'Higher Power' ka concept spiritual counselling mein kya signify karta hai?

options.A: Sirf ek specific religious god
options.B: Client ke liye koi bhi transcendent force ya source of wisdom, jo unhein guide kare
options.C: Client ka boss
options.D: Client ka bank balance

questions.explanation: Higher Power ek broad concept hai jo client ke liye koi bhi transcendent force, divine presence ya source of wisdom ho sakta hai, jo unhein support aur direction provide karta hai. Yeh har client ke liye alag ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Karma ka concept spiritual counselling mein kaise relevant hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf punishment ke baare mein hai
options.B: Yeh actions aur unke consequences ke principle ko darshata hai
options.C: Yeh counselling sessions ki fees decide karta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf past life se juda hai

questions.explanation: Karma ka concept actions aur unke consequences ke principle ko darshata hai. Spiritual counselling mein, yeh client ko apni choices aur unke impact ko samajhne mein madad karta hai, aur responsible actions lene ke liye encourage karta hai.

questions.question: Forgiveness ka spiritual healing process mein kya role hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf dusron ko maaf karne ke baare mein hai
options.B: Yeh khud ko aur dusron ko maaf karne se inner peace aur healing laata hai
options.C: Yeh sirf forgetfulness ke baare mein hai
options.D: Yeh revenge lene ka ek tareeka hai

questions.explanation: Forgiveness, chahe woh khud ko ho ya dusron ko, inner peace, emotional healing aur spiritual growth ke liye bahut zaroori hai. Yeh bitterness aur resentment se mukti dilaata hai.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling mein values ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Values sirf client ke bank account mein kitna paisa hai, yeh batati hain
options.B: Values client ke actions aur decisions ko guide karti hain, unki life ko meaning deti hain
options.C: Values sirf doosron ko judge karne ke liye hoti hain
options.D: Values ka spiritual journey se koi lena dena nahi hai

questions.explanation: Values woh principles hain jo client ke actions aur decisions ko guide karte hain. Apne core values ko pehchanna aur unke anusaar jeena spiritual fulfillment aur meaning ke liye mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: 'Aatma' aur 'Parmatma' ka concept kis Indian spiritual tradition mein commonly paya jaata hai?

options.A: Christianity
options.B: Islam
options.C: Hinduism
options.D: Judaism

questions.explanation: Aatma (individual soul) aur Parmatma (Supreme Soul) ka concept Hinduism aur kai anya Indian spiritual traditions mein moolbhoot hai.

questions.question: Grief aur Loss ko spiritual perspective se kaise dekha ja sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf ek negative event ke roop mein
options.B: Ek opportunity for spiritual growth aur transformation ke roop mein
options.C: Ek aisi cheez jise turant bhool jana chahiye
options.D: Ek punishment ke roop mein

questions.explanation: Spiritual perspective se, grief aur loss ko ek opportunity ke roop mein dekha ja sakta hai jahan ek vyakti apni inner strength, faith aur connection to something larger than self ko dhoondh sakta hai.

questions.question: Compassion (karuna) ka spiritual counselling mein kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf dusron par daya karna hai
options.B: Yeh dusron ke dukh ko samajhna aur unhein kam karne ki ichha rakhna hai
options.C: Yeh sirf kamzor logon ke liye hai
options.D: Yeh counsellor ko emotional kar deta hai

questions.explanation: Compassion ka matlab hai dusron ke dukh ko samajhna aur us dukh ko kam karne ki gehri ichha rakhna. Yeh spiritual practice aur counselling mein ek moolbhoot gun hai.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling mein 'Ego' ka kya role ho sakta hai?

options.A: Ego hamesha beneficial hota hai
options.B: Ego self-awareness aur spiritual growth mein baadha ban sakta hai
options.C: Ego ka spiritual path se koi lena dena nahi hai
options.D: Ego hi sab kuch hai

questions.explanation: Spiritual traditions mein, ego ko aksar self-centered identification ke roop mein dekha jaata hai jo spiritual growth mein baadha ban sakta hai. Counselling mein, client ko ego ke patterns ko pehchanne aur unse pare dekhne mein help ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Gratitude (kritagyata) spiritual well-being ko kaise badhata hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf dusron ko impress karne ka tareeka hai
options.B: Yeh positive emotions badhata hai aur life ki acchi cheezon par focus karne mein help karta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf tab kiya jaata hai jab sab kuch theek ho
options.D: Yeh spiritual growth mein koi role nahi nibhata

questions.explanation: Gratitude practice karne se positive emotions badhte hain, life mein santushti aati hai aur yeh challenging times mein bhi hope maintain karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Spiritual awakening ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Raat ko neend se jaagna
options.B: Life ke gehrayi aur universal connection ki gehri samajh develop karna
options.C: Kisi naye religion mein convert hona
options.D: Sirf ek achha sapna dekhna

questions.explanation: Spiritual awakening ek aisi prakriya hai jahan ek vyakti life ke gehrayi, meaning aur universal connection ki gehri samajh develop karta hai, aksar ek transformational experience ke baad.

questions.question: Dharma ka concept kis cheez se related hai Indian context mein?

options.A: Sirf money-making se
options.B: Righteous conduct, moral duty aur cosmic order se
options.C: Sirf festivals se
options.D: Sirf political power se

questions.explanation: Dharma ka matlab hai righteous conduct, moral duty, virtues aur cosmic order jo sabhi jeevon ko support karta hai. Yeh ek vyakti ke kartavya aur sahi jeene ke tareeke ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Spiritual well-being ke liye 'connection' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Sirf internet connection
options.B: Apne higher self, dusron aur nature se judav mehsoos karna
options.C: Sirf social media connection
options.D: Connection ka spiritual well-being se koi lena dena nahi hai

questions.explanation: Spiritual well-being ke liye apne higher self, dusron, community aur nature se judav (connection) mehsoos karna bahut zaroori hai. Yeh loneliness ko kam karta hai aur belongingness ki feeling deta hai.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling mein 'shadow self' ka concept kya darshata hai?

options.A: Client ki pasandida movie characters
options.B: Client ke personality ke un aspects ko jo unhein pasand nahi ya woh dabate hain
options.C: Client ka reflection mirror mein
options.D: Client ka spiritual guide

questions.explanation: Carl Jung ke अनुसार, shadow self personality ke un aspects ko darshata hai jo ek vyakti apne aap mein pasand nahi karta ya jinhein woh unconscious mein dabata hai. Inhein acknowledge aur integrate karna spiritual growth ke liye mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Meditation ka spiritual journey mein kya contribution hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf neend laane ke liye hai
options.B: Yeh mind ko shant karta hai, self-awareness badhata hai aur inner peace laata hai
options.C: Yeh sirf ek religious ritual hai
options.D: Yeh sirf physical exercise hai

questions.explanation: Meditation mind ko shant karne, self-awareness badhane, stress kam karne aur inner peace ko prapt karne ka ek shaktishali tool hai, jo spiritual growth mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Spiritual resilience ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf physical strength
options.B: Challenges aur adversities ke samay apni spiritual core se strength draw karna
options.C: Kabhi mushkil na aana
options.D: Sirf paisa hona

questions.explanation: Spiritual resilience ka matlab hai life ki mushkilon aur chunautiyon ka saamna karte hue apni spiritual core, beliefs aur values se taakat prapt karna, aur unse nikal kar aur mazboot banna.

questions.question: Active listening mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Client ko beech mein tokna
options.B: Client ki baat ko poore dhyan se sunna aur uski feelings ko samajhna
options.C: Sirf apne agle sawal ke baare mein sochna
options.D: Client ko apni life ki kahani sunana

questions.explanation: Active listening mein client ki baat ko poore dhyan se sunna, uske verbal aur non-verbal cues ko samajhna, aur uski feelings ko validate karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Rapport building spiritual counselling mein kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki counsellor client se fees zyada le sake
options.B: Taki client counsellor par trust kare aur khul kar baat kar sake
options.C: Taki session jaldi khatam ho jaye
options.D: Taki counsellor client ko control kar sake

questions.explanation: Rapport building se client aur counsellor ke beech trust aur understanding develop hoti hai, jo effective counselling ke liye foundation hai.

questions.question: Ek client jo apni life mein directionless feel kar raha hai, uske liye kaun si counselling technique helpful ho sakti hai?

options.A: Usey ignore karna
options.B: Usey apne core values aur life purpose explore karne mein guide karna
options.C: Usey bolna ki woh sab kuch bhool jaye
options.D: Usey koi random advice dena

questions.explanation: Client ko apne core values, passions aur life purpose ko explore karne mein guide karna unhein direction aur meaning dhoondhne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Empathy ka spiritual counselling mein kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ki problem ko solve karna
options.B: Client ki feelings ko samajhna aur unhein mehsoos karna jaise woh khud kar rahe hon
options.C: Client ke liye sorry bolna
options.D: Client ki feelings ko judge karna

questions.explanation: Empathy ka matlab hai client ke experiences aur feelings ko uske perspective se samajhna aur uski emotions ko share karna, bina khud us situation mein phanse.

questions.question: Open-ended questions counselling mein kyun use kiye jaate hain?

options.A: Taki client sirf 'yes' ya 'no' mein jawab de
options.B: Taki client apni feelings aur thoughts ko detail mein express kar sake
options.C: Taki session jaldi khatam ho jaye
options.D: Taki counsellor ko zyada bolna pade

questions.explanation: Open-ended questions client ko apni feelings, thoughts aur experiences ko detail mein express karne ka mauka dete hain, jisse gehri understanding develop hoti hai.

questions.question: Reflecting feelings technique ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.A: Client ko batana ki woh galat hai
options.B: Client ki verbal aur non-verbal feelings ko mirror karke unhein validate karna
options.C: Client ko apni feelings chupane ko bolna
options.D: Counsellor ki apni feelings share karna

questions.explanation: Reflecting feelings mein counsellor client ki verbal aur non-verbal feelings ko paraphrase ya mirror karta hai, jisse client ko lagta hai ki uski baat suni aur samjhi ja rahi hai.

questions.question: Summarization technique counselling mein kab use ki jaati hai?

options.A: Session ke shuruat mein
options.B: Jab client bahar ja raha ho
options.C: Session ke beech mein ya ant mein, important points ko consolidate karne ke liye
options.D: Jab counsellor ko neend aa rahi ho

questions.explanation: Summarization technique session ke beech mein ya ant mein use ki jaati hai taaki important points ko consolidate kiya ja sake, client ko uski progress dikhayi ja sake aur understanding confirm ki ja sake.

questions.question: Ek client jo spirituality mein naya hai, usko meditation guide karte samay counsellor ko kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Usey sabse mushkil meditation technique sikhani chahiye
options.B: Simple, basic techniques se shuru karna aur patience rakhna
options.C: Usey bolna ki woh sirf books padhe
options.D: Usey sirf apna phone use karne ko bolna

questions.explanation: Ek naye client ko simple aur basic meditation techniques se shuru karwana chahiye aur unhein patience ke saath practice karne ke liye encourage karna chahiye.

questions.question: Challenging a client's irrational beliefs ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ko batana ki woh galat hai
options.B: Client ke sochne ke tareeke par sawal uthana taaki woh naye perspectives explore kar sake
options.C: Client ke beliefs ko turant badal dena
options.D: Client ko chup karana

questions.explanation: Challenging irrational beliefs ka matlab hai client ke sochne ke patterns par sawal uthana, taki woh naye perspectives explore kar sake aur apne beliefs ko re-evaluate kar sake, bina unhein judge kiye.

questions.question: Metaphors aur storytelling spiritual counselling mein kaise helpful ho sakte hain?

options.A: Yeh sirf time pass karne ke liye hain
options.B: Yeh complex spiritual concepts ko samajhne mein aur insights develop karne mein madad karte hain
options.C: Yeh client ko neend laane mein madad karte hain
options.D: Yeh sirf bachchon ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Metaphors aur storytelling complex spiritual concepts ko simplify karte hain, client ko naye perspectives dete hain aur unhein apni situation ko alag tareeke se dekhne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Goal setting spiritual counselling mein kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki client ko pata na chale woh kya kar raha hai
options.B: Taki client ke spiritual journey ko direction mile aur progress track ki ja sake
options.C: Taki counsellor ko zyada kam karna pade
options.D: Taki client sirf apne dreams dekhe

questions.explanation: Goal setting client ke spiritual journey ko ek clear direction deta hai, unhein motivated rakhta hai aur unki progress ko track karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Client ki resistance ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Usey ignore karna
options.B: Usey confront karna aur us par gussa karna
options.C: Usey samajhna, acknowledge karna aur uske saath kaam karna
options.D: Usey session se nikal dena

questions.explanation: Resistance ko samajhna, acknowledge karna aur uske underlying reasons ko explore karna zaroori hai. Isse client ko safe feel hota hai aur woh resistance se bahar nikalne mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Silence ka effective use counselling mein kya darshata hai?

options.A: Counsellor ko kuch pata nahi
options.B: Client ko apne thoughts process karne aur gehrai mein jaane ka mauka dena
options.C: Session khatam ho gaya hai
options.D: Counsellor neend mein hai

questions.explanation: Effective use of silence client ko apne thoughts, feelings aur insights ko process karne aur gehrai mein jaane ka mauka deta hai, jo self-discovery ke liye mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Ek spiritual counsellor ko feedback kaise dena chahiye?

options.A: Sirf negative feedback dena
options.B: Constructive, specific aur non-judgmental tareeke se
options.C: Sirf positive feedback dena
options.D: Koi feedback na dena

questions.explanation: Feedback constructive, specific aur non-judgmental hona chahiye, taki client usse seekh sake aur apni spiritual journey mein progress kar sake.

questions.question: Spiritual journaling technique ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf likhne ki exercise hai
options.B: Yeh self-reflection, emotional processing aur spiritual insights ke liye ek tool hai
options.C: Yeh sirf time waste hai
options.D: Yeh sirf dusron ko dikhane ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Spiritual journaling self-reflection, emotional processing, patterns ko pehchanne aur spiritual insights ko record karne ka ek powerful tool hai.

questions.question: Client ko self-compassion develop karne mein kaise help kar sakte hain?

options.A: Usey apni galtiyon ke liye khud ko blame karne ko bolkar
options.B: Usey apni imperfections ko accept karne aur khud par daya karne ke liye encourage karke
options.C: Usey bolna ki woh sirf perfect bane
options.D: Usey sirf dusron ke baare mein sochna chahiye

questions.explanation: Self-compassion mein apni imperfections ko accept karna, mushkil samay mein khud par daya karna aur khud ko ek dost ki tarah treat karna shamil hai. Counsellor ismein client ko guide karta hai.

questions.question: Visualisation techniques spiritual counselling mein kis liye use hoti hain?

options.A: Sirf sapne dekhne ke liye
options.B: Client ko relax karne, goals visualize karne aur inner resources access karne mein madad karne ke liye
options.C: Client ko bhramit karne ke liye
options.D: Client ko aur zyada stress dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Visualisation techniques client ko relax karne, positive outcomes ko imagine karne, goals visualize karne aur apni inner strength aur resources ko access karne mein madad karti hain.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling mein confidentiality ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ki baatein sabse share karna
options.B: Client ki personal information ko confidential rakhna, jab tak koi legal ya safety issue na ho
options.C: Sirf counsellor ki baatein confidential rakhna
options.D: Confidentiality ka koi matlab nahi

questions.explanation: Confidentiality ka matlab hai client dwara share ki gayi personal information ko gopniya rakhna, jab tak koi legal ya ethical exception na ho (jaise self-harm ya harm to others ka risk).

questions.question: Informed consent counselling mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf ek formal requirement hai
options.B: Client ko counselling process, boundaries aur confidentiality ke baare mein poori jankari dena
options.C: Counsellor ko client ko control karne ki permission dena
options.D: Client ko apni fees batana

questions.explanation: Informed consent client ko counselling process, uske goals, methods, fees, confidentiality limits aur other terms ke baare mein poori jankari deta hai, taki woh ek informed decision le sake.

questions.question: Dual relationships se counsellor ko kyun bachna chahiye?

options.A: Yeh counselling ko aur interesting banate hain
options.B: Yeh professional boundaries ko blur karte hain aur client ke hiton ko nuksan pahuncha sakte hain
options.C: Yeh counselling sessions ko chhota karte hain
options.D: Yeh counselling ko zyada effective banate hain

questions.explanation: Dual relationships (jaise client ke saath dost, business partner ya romantic partner banna) professional boundaries ko blur karte hain, objectivity ko kam karte hain aur client ke hiton ko nuksan pahuncha sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar counsellor ko lagta hai ki client ki problem uske competence area se bahar hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Phir bhi counselling karte rehna
options.B: Client ko ek qualified professional ke paas refer karna
options.C: Client ko bolna ki woh apni problem khud solve kare
options.D: Google par solution dhoondhna

questions.explanation: Ek ethical counsellor ko apni limits pata honi chahiye. Agar client ki problem uske competence area se bahar hai, toh usko turant ek qualified professional ke paas refer karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ethical boundaries maintain karna counselling mein kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf rules follow karne ke liye
options.B: Client ki safety, trust aur well-being ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Counsellor ko powerful banane ke liye
options.D: Sessions ko boring banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Ethical boundaries client ki safety, trust aur well-being ko ensure karte hain, aur counsellor ko professional aur responsible tareeke se kaam karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Spiritual counsellor ko apne personal beliefs client par impose kyun nahi karne chahiye?

options.A: Taki client confused na ho
options.B: Taki client apni spiritual path khud discover kar sake, bina kisi external pressure ke
options.C: Taki counselling session chhota ho jaye
options.D: Taki counsellor ko kam bolna pade

questions.explanation: Client ko apni spiritual path khud discover karne ki freedom honi chahiye. Counsellor ka kaam guide karna hai, na ki apne personal beliefs impose karna.

questions.question: Agar client gifts offer karta hai, toh counsellor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Hamesha accept karna chahiye
options.B: Small, symbolic gifts accept kar sakte hain, lekin expensive gifts avoid karne chahiye
options.C: Sirf cash accept karna chahiye
options.D: Client ko bolna chahiye ki woh aur gifts laye

questions.explanation: Small, symbolic gifts jo relationship ko affect na karein, unhein accept kiya ja sakta hai. Lekin expensive gifts ya gifts jo dual relationship ka hint dein, unhein politely decline karna chahiye taaki professional boundaries maintain rahein.

questions.question: Supervision spiritual counselling mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki counsellor ko zyada kam karna pade
options.B: Taki counsellor apni practice ko improve kar sake, ethical dilemmas discuss kar sake aur burnout se bach sake
options.C: Taki counsellor ki galti pakdi ja sake
options.D: Supervision ki koi zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Supervision counsellor ko apni practice ko improve karne, ethical dilemmas ko discuss karne, naye perspectives paane aur burnout se bachne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Client ki autonomy ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ko sab kuch khud karne dena
options.B: Client ko apne decisions khud lene ka adhikar dena
options.C: Client ko counsellor ke decisions follow karne ko bolna
options.D: Client ko koi bhi decision na lene dena

questions.explanation: Client ki autonomy ka matlab hai client ko apne decisions khud lene ka adhikar dena aur unki choices ko respect karna, jab tak woh khud ke ya dusron ke liye haanikarak na ho.

questions.question: Agar counsellor ko client ke baare mein personal feelings develop ho jaati hain, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Un feelings ko ignore karna
options.B: Un feelings ko supervision mein discuss karna aur zaroorat padne par client ko refer karna
options.C: Client ke saath relationship shuru karna
options.D: Un feelings ko client se share karna

questions.explanation: Personal feelings develop hone par unhein ignore karna ya client se share karna unethical ho sakta hai. Unhein supervision mein discuss karna aur zaroorat padne par client ko refer karna professional tareeka hai.

questions.question: Record keeping spiritual counselling mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf legal formality ke liye
options.B: Client ki progress track karne, continuity maintain karne aur ethical standards poore karne ke liye
options.C: Client ki personal life par nazar rakhne ke liye
options.D: Record keeping ki koi zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Record keeping client ki progress track karne, counselling ki continuity maintain karne, accountability ensure karne aur ethical standards poore karne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client ki cultural aur religious diversity ka samman karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki client ko achha feel ho
options.B: Taki counselling effective ho aur client ko safe aur respected mehsoos ho
options.C: Taki counsellor ko naye cultures ke baare mein pata chale
options.D: Yeh sirf ek formality hai

questions.explanation: Client ki cultural aur religious diversity ka samman karna bahut zaroori hai. Isse client ko safe aur respected mehsoos hota hai, aur counselling relationship mein trust build hota hai.

questions.question: Agar ek client counselling fees nahi de pa raha hai, toh counsellor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usey counselling band kar deni chahiye
options.B: Sliding scale fees, pro bono work ya referral options explore karne chahiye
options.C: Usey dhamkana chahiye
options.D: Usey bolna chahiye ki woh udhaar le

questions.explanation: Ethical practice mein, counsellor ko sliding scale fees, pro bono work ya affordable counselling services ke liye referral options explore karne chahiye taki client ko support milta rahe.

questions.question: Counsellor ko apni personal spiritual practice maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki woh client ko impress kar sake
options.B: Taki woh apna self-care kar sake aur apni effectiveness maintain kar sake
options.C: Taki woh client se zyada spiritual lage
options.D: Iska counselling se koi lena dena nahi hai

questions.explanation: Counsellor ko apni personal spiritual practice maintain karna zaroori hai taaki woh apna self-care kar sake, apni inner resources ko replenish kar sake aur apni counselling effectiveness ko maintain kar sake.

questions.question: Boundaries kab cross hoti hain?

options.A: Jab client aur counsellor dono ek hi room mein hote hain
options.B: Jab counsellor client ke saath professional relationship ke bahar koi aur relationship banata hai
options.C: Jab client baat karta hai
options.D: Jab counsellor active listening karta hai

questions.explanation: Boundaries tab cross hoti hain jab counsellor client ke saath professional relationship ke bahar koi aur relationship banata hai, jaise dost, business partner, ya romantic partner.

questions.question: Ethical decision-making process mein pehla kadam kya hai?

options.A: Turant koi bhi decision le lena
options.B: Ethical dilemma ko pehchanna aur uski jankari ikatthi karna
options.C: Dusron ko blame karna
options.D: Problem ko ignore karna

questions.explanation: Ethical decision-making process mein pehla kadam hai ethical dilemma ko pehchanna, involved parties ko identify karna aur relevant information ikatthi karna.

questions.question: Counsellor ko apni personal biases ke baare mein kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhein chupana chahiye
options.B: Unhein pehchanna aur unka counselling process par asar kam karne ki koshish karna chahiye
options.C: Unhein client par impose karna chahiye
options.D: Unhein ignore karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Counsellor ko apni personal biases ko pehchanna aur unka self-reflection ke through counselling process par asar kam karne ki koshish karna chahiye, taki client ko unbiased support mile.

questions.question: Ek client jo 'loss of faith' se guzar raha hai, usko counsellor kaise support kar sakta hai?

options.A: Usey bolna ki woh aur zyada dharmik bane
options.B: Uski feelings ko validate karna aur uski spiritual questions ko explore karne mein help karna
options.C: Usey ignore karna
options.D: Usey apna religion badalne ki salah dena

questions.explanation: Loss of faith ek mushkil anubhav hai. Counsellor ko client ki feelings ko validate karna chahiye aur unhein unki spiritual questions aur doubts ko explore karne mein non-judgmentally support karna chahiye.

questions.question: Grief aur bereavement ke dauraan spiritual counselling ka kya role hai?

options.A: Dukh ko turant khatam karna
options.B: Client ko dukh aur loss ko process karne aur usmein meaning dhoondhne mein help karna
options.C: Client ko bolna ki woh roye nahi
options.D: Client ko sirf khush rehne ko bolna

questions.explanation: Spiritual counselling client ko grief aur loss ko process karne, usmein meaning dhoondhne, aur apni spiritual resources (jaise faith, hope, connection) se strength lene mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Existential questions (jaise 'jeevan ka arth kya hai?') ko counsellor kaise handle karega?

options.A: Usey ek fix jawab dekar
options.B: Client ko apni values, purpose aur meaning ko explore karne mein guide karke
options.C: Usey bolna ki aise sawal na puche
options.D: Usey philosophical books padhne ko bolkar

questions.explanation: Existential questions ke koi readymade answers nahi hote. Counsellor client ko apni values, purpose aur meaning ko explore karne mein guide karta hai, taki woh apne answers khud dhoondh sake.

questions.question: Agar client guilt ya shame se pareshan hai, toh counsellor kya kar sakta hai?

options.A: Usey judge karna
options.B: Usey apni feelings ko express karne, self-forgiveness practice karne aur growth ki taraf badhne mein help karna
options.C: Usey bolna ki woh galat hai
options.D: Usey apni problems chupane ko bolna

questions.explanation: Guilt aur shame ko address karne ke liye counsellor client ko apni feelings ko express karne, self-compassion aur self-forgiveness practice karne aur growth ki taraf badhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Spiritual crisis ko kaise pehchanein?

options.A: Jab client ko koi physical illness ho
options.B: Jab client apni pehle ki spiritual beliefs par sawal uthata hai aur gehre existential dukh se guzar raha ho
options.C: Jab client bahut khush ho
options.D: Jab client ko naya job mil jaye

questions.explanation: Spiritual crisis mein ek vyakti apni pehle ki spiritual beliefs, values aur meaning par sawal uthata hai, aur aksar gehre existential dukh, confusion ya dis-orientation mehsoos karta hai.

questions.question: Forgiveness issues (kisi ko maaf na kar pana) wale client ko kaise support karein?

options.A: Usey force karna ki woh maaf kar de
options.B: Usey forgiveness ke process ko samajhne, uske benefits ko explore karne aur apni pace par aage badhne mein help karna
options.C: Usey bolna ki revenge le
options.D: Usey uski feelings ko ignore karne ko bolna

questions.explanation: Forgiveness ek complex process hai. Counsellor client ko is process ko samajhne, uske personal benefits ko explore karne aur apni pace par aage badhne mein support karta hai, bina force kiye.

questions.question: Agar client ko lagta hai ki uski life mein koi purpose nahi hai, toh counsellor kya karega?

options.A: Usey bolna ki woh galat hai
options.B: Usey apne talents, passions aur values ko explore karne mein help karna, aur unhein bade context mein dekhne ke liye encourage karna
options.C: Usey koi bhi purpose assign kar dena
options.D: Usey bolna ki woh sirf kaam karta rahe

questions.explanation: Counsellor client ko apne unique talents, passions aur values ko explore karne mein help karta hai, aur unhein ek bade spiritual ya universal context mein dekhne ke liye encourage karta hai, jisse purpose ki feeling develop ho.

questions.question: Dealing with suffering (dukh se nipatna) mein spiritual counselling kaise madad karti hai?

options.A: Dukh ko jaadui tareeke se gayab kar deti hai
options.B: Client ko suffering ko accept karne, usmein meaning dhoondhne aur inner resilience develop karne mein help karti hai
options.C: Client ko bolna ki woh dukh ko ignore kare
options.D: Client ko aur zyada dukh dena

questions.explanation: Spiritual counselling client ko suffering ko accept karne, usmein meaning dhoondhne, aur apni inner strength aur resilience ko develop karne mein madad karti hai, na ki dukh ko gayab karna.

questions.question: Client jo apni spiritual beliefs aur modern life ke beech conflict mehsoos kar raha hai, usko kaise guide karein?

options.A: Usey modern life chhodne ko bolna
options.B: Usey dono ke beech balance dhoondhne aur apne values ke saath align hone mein help karna
options.C: Usey apni beliefs chhodne ko bolna
options.D: Usey bolna ki woh sirf ek hi cheez par focus kare

questions.explanation: Counsellor client ko apni spiritual beliefs aur modern life ke beech balance dhoondhne, apne core values ke saath align hone aur is conflict ko ek growth opportunity ke roop mein dekhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Spiritual burnout ke signs kya ho sakte hain?

options.A: Bahut zyada energy mehsoos karna
options.B: Apathy, cynicism, exhaustion aur spiritual practices se disconnect mehsoos karna
options.C: Bahut khush rehna
options.D: Naye spiritual groups join karna

questions.explanation: Spiritual burnout ke signs mein aam taur par apathy, cynicism, exhaustion, aur apni spiritual practices ya higher connection se disconnect mehsoos karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Client ko inner peace dhoondhne mein counsellor kaise madad kar sakta hai?

options.A: Usey sab kuch control karne ko bolkar
options.B: Usey mindfulness, meditation aur acceptance practice karne mein guide karke
options.C: Usey bahar ki duniya mein shanti dhoondhne ko bolkar
options.D: Usey apni problems ko ignore karne ko bolkar

questions.explanation: Counsellor client ko mindfulness, meditation, acceptance, aur apni inner world mein shanti dhoondhne ke tareeke sikhata hai, bajaye ki bahar ki circumstances par nirbhar rehne ke.

questions.question: Agar client ko lagta hai ki woh spiritual path par 'stuck' hai, toh counsellor kya karega?

options.A: Usey bolna ki woh chhod de
options.B: Usey naye perspectives explore karne, apni practices ko re-evaluate karne aur small, actionable steps lene mein help karna
options.C: Usey bolna ki woh dusron ko blame kare
options.D: Usey ek hi raste par chalte rehne ko bolna

questions.explanation: Jab client stuck mehsoos kare, toh counsellor usko naye perspectives explore karne, apni current practices ko re-evaluate karne aur small, actionable steps lene mein madad karta hai, taki woh aage badh sake.

questions.question: Client ko self-love aur self-acceptance develop karne mein kaise support karein?

options.A: Usey apni galtiyon par focus karne ko bolkar
options.B: Usey apni imperfections ke saath khud ko accept karne aur khud par daya karne ke liye encourage karke
options.C: Usey sirf dusron ko pyaar karne ko bolkar
options.D: Usey bolna ki woh sabse perfect bane

questions.explanation: Counsellor client ko apni imperfections ke saath khud ko accept karne, self-compassion practice karne aur ek healthy self-relationship develop karne ke liye support karta hai.

questions.question: Spiritual counselling mein 'existential loneliness' ko kaise address karte hain?

options.A: Client ko bahut saare dost banane ko bolkar
options.B: Client ko universal connection aur meaning dhoondhne mein help karke, jo uski inner void ko fill kare
options.C: Client ko ignore karke
options.D: Client ko bolna ki woh akele rahe

questions.explanation: Existential loneliness ko address karne ke liye counsellor client ko apne universal connection, purpose aur meaning ko explore karne mein help karta hai, taki woh apni inner void ko fill kar sake aur belongingness mehsoos kare.

questions.question: Client ko apni spiritual practice ko daily life mein integrate karne mein kaise help karein?

options.A: Usey sirf sunday ko practice karne ko bolkar
options.B: Usey practical, small steps suggest karke jo woh apni routine mein shamil kar sake
options.C: Usey apni practice chhodne ko bolkar
options.D: Usey sirf badi-badi rituals karne ko bolkar

questions.explanation: Counsellor client ko practical, small steps suggest karta hai (jaise daily mindfulness, gratitude practice, short meditation) jo woh apni daily routine mein shamil kar sake, taki spiritual practice life ka hissa ban jaye.

questions.question: Death aur dying ke spiritual aspects ko kaise discuss karein?

options.A: Is topic ko avoid karna chahiye
options.B: Client ko death ke baare mein apne beliefs explore karne, existential fears ko address karne aur peace dhoondhne mein help karna
options.C: Client ko bolna ki woh iske baare mein na soche
options.D: Client ko sirf medical facts batana

questions.explanation: Death aur dying ek sensitive topic hai. Counsellor client ko death ke baare mein apne beliefs explore karne, existential fears ko address karne, aur transition mein peace aur meaning dhoondhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Spiritual counsellor ke liye burnout prevention kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki woh zyada fees charge kar sake
options.B: Taki woh effective counselling provide kar sake aur apni well-being maintain kar sake
options.C: Taki woh kam kaam kare
options.D: Taki woh holidays par ja sake

questions.explanation: Burnout prevention counsellor ke liye bahut zaroori hai taki woh apni mental, emotional aur spiritual well-being ko maintain kar sake aur clients ko effective support provide kar sake.

questions.question: Ek spiritual counsellor ko apni personal spiritual practice maintain karna kyun chahiye?

options.A: Sirf client ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Apni inner resources ko replenish karne, self-awareness badhane aur empathy maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Taki woh sabse zyada spiritual lage
options.D: Iska professional practice se koi lena dena nahi hai

questions.explanation: Personal spiritual practice counsellor ko apni inner resources ko replenish karne, self-awareness badhane, empathy maintain karne aur apni professional effectiveness ko badhane mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Work-life balance maintain karna counsellor ke liye kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki woh kam kaam kare
options.B: Taki woh burnout se bach sake, apni energy maintain kar sake aur apni personal relationships ko nourish kar sake
options.C: Taki uske paas zyada free time ho
options.D: Taki woh sirf apne baare mein soche

questions.explanation: Work-life balance counsellor ko burnout se bachne, apni energy levels maintain karne, aur apni personal life aur relationships ko nourish karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Peer support groups spiritual counsellors ke liye kaise helpful hain?

options.A: Yeh sirf gossip karne ke liye hain
options.B: Yeh experience share karne, new ideas paane aur emotional support ke liye ek platform provide karte hain
options.C: Yeh competition badhate hain
options.D: Yeh sirf time waste hain

questions.explanation: Peer support groups counsellors ko apne experiences share karne, naye ideas aur perspectives paane, aur emotional support prapt karne ke liye ek safe space provide karte hain.

questions.question: Professional development aur continuing education spiritual counselling mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf degrees ikatthi karne ke liye
options.B: Apni skills ko update karne, naye techniques seekhne aur professional competence maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Taki counsellor ko aur zyada fees mile
options.D: Yeh sirf ek formality hai

questions.explanation: Professional development aur continuing education counsellors ko apni skills ko update karne, naye techniques seekhne aur apni professional competence ko maintain karne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Ek spiritual counselling practice set up karte samay pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Turant client dhoondhna shuru karna
options.B: Legal aur ethical requirements ko samajhna aur poora karna
options.C: Ek badi office rent karna
options.D: Sirf naam decide karna

questions.explanation: Practice set up karte samay, sabse pehle legal aur ethical requirements ko samajhna aur poora karna zaroori hai, jaise registration, insurance aur confidentiality guidelines.

questions.question: Marketing aur outreach ke ethical tareeke kya hain spiritual counselling ke liye?

options.A: Jhoote daawe karna
options.B: Transparent aur honest information provide karna, aur apni services ko clearly define karna
options.C: Dusre counsellors ko badnaam karna
options.D: Sirf paise ke baare mein baat karna

questions.explanation: Ethical marketing mein transparent aur honest information provide karna, apni services ko clearly define karna, aur clients ke expectations ko realistically manage karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Fees structure decide karte samay kin baaton ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf apni marzi se fees rakhna
options.B: Market rates, apni experience, qualifications aur client ki affordability ko dhyan mein rakhna
options.C: Sirf client ki income dekhna
options.D: Fees structure ko kabhi change nahi karna

questions.explanation: Fees structure decide karte samay market rates, apni experience, qualifications aur client ki affordability (sliding scale options) ko dhyan mein rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Client records ko kaise maintain karna chahiye?

options.A: Kahin bhi likh lena
options.B: Secure, confidential aur organized tareeke se
options.C: Sirf client ke naam likhna
options.D: Records ko kabhi bhi delete kar dena

questions.explanation: Client records ko secure, confidential aur organized tareeke se maintain karna chahiye, jo ethical aur legal guidelines ko follow kare.

questions.question: Online spiritual counselling provide karte samay kya additional considerations hain?

options.A: Koi additional considerations nahi
options.B: Technology security, client ki physical location aur emergency protocols
options.C: Sirf achha internet connection
options.D: Client ko webcam use karne ko force karna

questions.explanation: Online counselling mein technology security (encryption), client ki physical location (jurisdictional issues), aur emergency protocols (local resources) jaise additional considerations hote hain.

questions.question: Counsellor ke liye 'self-reflection' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf time waste hai
options.B: Apni biases, strengths aur areas of improvement ko samajhne ke liye
options.C: Sirf apni achievements celebrate karne ke liye
options.D: Dusron ke baare mein sochna

questions.explanation: Self-reflection counsellor ko apni biases, strengths, limitations aur areas of improvement ko samajhne mein madad karti hai, jisse woh ek behtar counsellor ban sake.

questions.question: Agar counsellor ko lagaar emotional exhaustion mehsoos ho rahi hai, toh yeh kis cheez ka sign ho sakta hai?

options.A: Bahut zyada khushi ka
options.B: Burnout ka
options.C: Promotion ka
options.D: Nayi energy ka

questions.explanation: Lagaar emotional exhaustion burnout ka ek mukhya sign hai, jismein counsellor ko apni energy levels kam lagti hain aur woh apne kaam mein interest kho deta hai.

questions.question: Counsellor ko apni fees clients ko kab batani chahiye?

options.A: Session ke ant mein
options.B: Initial contact ya first session se pehle
options.C: Kabhi nahi batani chahiye
options.D: Sirf jab client puche

questions.explanation: Fees structure aur payment policies ko initial contact ya first session se pehle clearly communicate karna chahiye, informed consent ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Professional liability insurance spiritual counsellors ke liye kyun important hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf ek kharcha hai
options.B: Professional negligence ya malpractice claims se bachav ke liye
options.C: Yeh sirf bade hospitals ke liye hai
options.D: Iska koi fayda nahi

questions.explanation: Professional liability insurance counsellor ko professional negligence ya malpractice claims se bachav provide karta hai, jo ki professional practice ka ek mahatvapurna hissa hai.

questions.question: Client testimonials ko kaise use karna chahiye?

options.A: Hamesha sabhi testimonials publish karna chahiye
options.B: Client ki explicit permission ke saath aur anonymity maintain karte hue, ethical guidelines ke anusaar
options.C: Bina permission ke publish karna chahiye
options.D: Sirf jhoote testimonials use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Client testimonials ko client ki explicit permission ke saath, anonymity maintain karte hue aur ethical guidelines ke anusaar hi use karna chahiye. Kabhi bhi bina consent ke publish nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ending a counselling relationship (termination) ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Achanak se band kar dena chahiye
options.B: Client ke saath discussion karke, goals review karke aur future support plan banakar
options.C: Client ko bolna chahiye ki woh kabhi wapas na aaye
options.D: Counsellor ko gayab ho jana chahiye

questions.explanation: Termination process ko thoughtfully handle karna chahiye, jismein client ke saath discussion, goals review, progress celebrate karna aur future support ya referral plan banana shamil hai.
